deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?
memberManagementHelp: Click "+ Add" to search and stage new users or groups as members. Select existing members or nested groups with checkboxes and click "Remove" to stage removals. Click "Preview" to review all pending changes, then "Apply" to execute them. Nested groups can be expanded with the chevron to inspect their content.

searchHint: Type to search for users or groups
